contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: DApp Outbound Review v2 — tabs + filter chips + chrome fixes + sent-draft filtering
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/203
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/269
  
  Details:
  Iteration on the warmup review page based on operator feedback: (1) UI didn't match house chrome convention, (2) all 77 already-sent drafts were still showing as ghosts, (3) needed to also handle the manager follow-up cohort.
  
  Three layered fixes shipped:
  
  1. tokenomics PR #269 (merged) — GAS WarmupReviewApi.gs now accepts ?label= param (default AI/Warm-up; accepts AI/Follow-up), and filters out already-sent drafts via 3-source OR: GmailApp.getDrafts() set membership, Warmup Sends audit tab membership, and Email Agent Follow Up join on gmail_message_id. Verified live at deployment v25: 77 warm-up drafts (all sent today) → total 0; 19 follow-up drafts (also sent) → total 0. Ghost filtering works.
  
  2. dapp PR #203 (merged) — warmup_review.html upgraded to Outbound Review (URL preserved). Adds [Warm-ups | Follow-ups] tab toggle with URL hash state, badges showing both counts at a glance. Summary bar chips (red / yellow / clean / Hosts Circles / All) become clickable filter pills — tap to scope the list to that cohort. Chrome fixes brought the page in line with governor_contributor_admin convention: OG meta tags, logo image, Google Translate widget, Arial font + flex-column body layout, italic intro, Welcome banner, status color classes, Governor pill badge.
  
  3. menu.js + index.html updated to reflect Outbound Review name + dual-cohort scope.
  
  Outstanding: end-to-end smoke test on phone once Edgar deploy is run for the [WARMUP SEND EVENT] dispatcher (PR #1045 from earlier today).
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
